title: Edit Certificate
subtitle: Edit folder, email, and SANs. Certificate PEM and private key are not changed here (see detail page).

form.editSubtitle: Edit folder, email, and SANs. PEM and private key are view-only on the detail page.
form.autoNotEditable: Auto-discovered certificates cannot be manually edited. Please refresh from folders to update.
form.manualApplyEditable: Manually applied certificates can only edit folder name
form.folderNameHelp: Unique identifier, can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
